title: Board Game Reset
description: A board-game social skills stub where kids practice winning kindly, losing warmly, repairing accidents, and cleaning up.
learningGoals: Model good-sport words for winning and losing
Practice warm choices when a game feels wobbly or gets bumped
Treat cleanup as part of finishing play
interactionModel: choose-one tap the good-sport move or cleanup step after a spoken board-game scenario
feedbackModel: Good-sport choices sparkle and speak modeled words; misses wiggle with a gentle spoken nudge and retry.
credits: Emoji placeholder board-game art and shared character portraits. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
